experiment_title: 盐酸与硫酸的外观和气味比较实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="盐酸与硫酸的外观和气味比较实验" goal="比较盐酸和硫酸的外观、状态及气味，观察其物理性质差异并记录现象" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="bottle_HCl" type="reagent_bottle" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="bottle_H2SO4" type="reagent_bottle" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="white_paper" type="paper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="HCl_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="H2SO4_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="bottle_HCl" reagent="HCl" volume="20 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="bottle_H2SO4" reagent="H2SO4" volume="20 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="bottle_HCl" to_vessel="white_paper" volume="0 mL" id="step_2" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="bottle_H2SO4" to_vessel="white_paper" volume="0 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>
